ecs.taskdefinition.inferenceaccelerator..Docs: The Elastic Inference accelerator device name. The `deviceName` must also be referenced in a container definition as a [ResourceRequirement](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-ecs-taskdefinition-resourcerequirement.html).
The Elastic Inference accelerator type to use.
